purpose: English fixtures to test rawJobHash, canonicalJobHash and requirementSourceHash in EarlyCV.

01_rawhash_match.reason: Same content, only casing, spacing and line breaks differ.

02_canonicalhash_match_linkedin_noise.reason: Same job content, but one version includes LinkedIn/interface noise.

03_canonicalhash_match_greenhouse_noise.reason: Same job content, but one version includes common ATS/careers-site section noise.

04_both_fail_different_role.reason: Actually different jobs: Data Scientist vs Frontend Engineer.

05_both_fail_same_title_different_requir.reason: Same title and company, but stack/requirements differ significantly. Must not reuse blindly.

06_canonicalhash_should_not_match_if_sen.reason: Similar role family, but seniority changes from Junior to Senior. Must not reuse blindly.

07_requirement_match_different_company_t.reason: Different company/title metadata, but same cleaned description. Requirement source should match.

08_canonicalhash_match_indeed_noise.reason: Same job content, but one version includes Indeed page chrome and salary-guide noise.

09_canonicalhash_match_workday_noise.reason: Same job content, but one version includes Workday page chrome and metadata noise.
